title: Artificial Intelligence & PR In Nigeria, Adopting New Skills For Enhanced Effectiveness
description: Artificial Intelligence and Public Relations  (PR) in Nigeria, adopting new skills for enhanced effectiveness at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relatio
html: Artificial Intelligence and Public Relations  (PR) in Nigeria, adopting new skills for enhanced effectiveness at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence”, organized by the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR), Lagos state chapter.
